items.name_en: Top-tier original single replica exclusive photo📷【GRAND PALAIS Large Handbag】M45842 Black (Embossed)
items.name_cn:
Top-tier original single replica exclusive photo📷【GRAND PALAIS Large Handbag】M45842 Black (Embossed)
The Grand Palais handbag features a soft grained leather embossed with a large Monogram pattern, continuing Louis Vuitton's travel spirit with a nameplate and padlock. Neat compartments and pockets facilitate storage, while a detachable and adjustable shoulder strap enables handheld, elbow, and crossbody carrying.
Size: 34 x 24 x 15 cm

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_en: Top-tier original single replica exclusive photo📷M47164 Box Petite Valise Handbag
items.name_cn:
Top-tier original single replica exclusive photo📷M47164 Box Petite Valise Handbag
This version features Monogram Reverse canvas with calfskin trim, interpreting a miniature version of the brand's classic suitcase. The top handle highlights a soft elegance.
Size: 22.5 x 17.5 x 11 cm (L x H x W)

items.name_en: Top-tier original single replica exclusive photo📷N87212 Speedy Soft 30 Boho Handbag
items.name_cn:
Top-tier original single replica exclusive photo📷N87212 Speedy Soft 30 Boho Handbag
Crafted from classic Monogram coated canvas, it is accented with leather lining and a zippered interior pocket for a color contrast. Ostrich leather trim and beaded chains create a visual focal point, while the key pouch and address card add clever details. The Toron handle allows for multiple carrying methods.
Size: 21 x 17 x 30 cm (H x W x L)

specs.rawTitle:
Top-tier original single replica exclusive photo📷N87212 Speedy Soft 30 Boho Handbag
Crafted from classic Monogram coated canvas, it is accented with leather lining and a zippered interior pocket for a color contrast. Ostrich leather trim and beaded chains create a visual focal point, while the key pouch and address card add clever details. The Toron handle allows for multiple carrying methods.
Size: 21 x 17 x 30 cm (H x W x L)

items.name_en: Top-tier original stock [Exclusive real shot M48865 White flower charm / Mini] M21416 This Capucines Mini handbag is made from soft Taurillon calfskin, featuring a removable Monogram floral leather charm for a fresh seasonal look. The top handle and detachable, adjustable shoulder strap allow for versatile carrying: hand-held, elbow-carry, shoulder, or crossbody. size:21x14x8cm

items.name_en: Top-tier Original, Changed Code Chip M83030 Black
items.name_cn:
Top-tier Original, Changed Code Chip M83030 Black
The Side Trunk bag is inspired by the brand's classic trunk, using quilted calfskin to shape a trunk-like silhouette, embellished with refined metal parts like reinforced corners and rivets, and creatively connecting an S-lock clasp for the zipper closure.
Full-grain calfskin trim
Small 18 x 12.5 x 8 cm
Medium 21 x 14 x 6 cm
(L x H x W)
Calfskin trim

items.name_en: Top-tier Original, Changed Code Chip, Steel Hardware Series
items.name_cn:
Top-tier Original, Changed Code Chip, Steel Hardware Series
M83301 Black M11916 Olive
The Liv pochette in Monogram Empreinte leather fits snugly against the arm. It features a removable gold chain and a removable, adjustable double strap made of Louis Vuitton's signature natural calfskin. A secure double zipper closure and engraved gold plate add a stylish touch.
Size: 24x13x6.5cm

Top-tier Original Custom Leather~ Colors continuously updating!
This GO-14 Medium Tote is crafted from exquisite sheepskin leather, featuring a quilted pattern inspired by the brand's traditional luggage design. The Twist lock adds a striking touch, while the top handle can be carried alone or converted into a leather shoulder pad with a sliding chain strap for a comfortable shoulder or crossbody experience.
Dimensions: 23 x 16 x 10cm

items.name_cn:
Top-tier Original, Changing Chip
M12019 This Lockit BB Bag draws inspiration from the 1960s Knick-Knack Bag, offering flexible carrying options. The Monogram coated canvas features a curved top edge and oval trim, highlighting classic design elements. The lock closure pays homage to the brand's heritage.
15 x 19 x 7 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
Coated Canvas
Calfskin Trim
Metal Hardware
Lock
Key Pouch
Strap: Removable, Adjustable
Strap Half Length: 44.0 cm
Strap Half Length Adjustable To: 50.0 cm
Chain: Removable
Chain Half Length: 18.0 cm
Handle: Double Handle
This product is made in France, Spain, Italy, or the USA.
